word: G2313 - θεομαχέω - theomachéō - theh-o-makh-eh'-o - Fight against God

sections.paragraph:
- Original: θεομαχέω

- Transliteration: theomacheo

- Phonetic: theh-o-makh-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to fight against God

- Origin: from G2314

- TDNT entry: 12:48,6

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G2314; to resist deity: - fight against God.
